phase9HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 9 run-log commit/push status to committed and pushed as c292e91 feat: add site student detail timeline.

queueScopeStrategy.siteSelection: Reuses shared site-selection logic and selected active site access.
queueScopeStrategy.studentScope: Starts from active selected-site site_users joined to active student accounts and student role memberships.
queueScopeStrategy.workflowScope: Submissions, evidence counts, review counts, and comment counts are derived only for selected-site students.
queueScopeStrategy.programTeacherScope: Intersects selected-site students with getProgramTeacherScopedStudentIds for teacher-visible program/cohort scope.

decisionScopeStrategy.siteAwarePath: When siteId is supplied, the decision route validates active selected-site student membership, site access, program_teacher role, and teacher program/cohort scope.
decisionScopeStrategy.compatibilityPath: When siteId is absent, existing canReviewSubmission compatibility behavior is preserved.
decisionScopeStrategy.statusRules: Existing submitted-only decision behavior is preserved; non-submitted status-changing decisions return conflict.
decisionScopeStrategy.existenceLeakage: Out-of-scope selected-site/program submissions use generic denial/not_found responses without naming the true site, student, or program.

roleMutationPolicy.program_teacher: Can approve, request revision, and add comment-only feedback for in-scope submitted submissions.
roleMutationPolicy.site_admin: Read-only in the new site Review Queue UI and site-aware decision path.
roleMutationPolicy.org_admin: Read-only in the new site Review Queue UI.
roleMutationPolicy.platform_admin: Read-only in the new site Review Queue UI.
roleMutationPolicy.legacy_admin: Read-only in the new site UI; existing backend compatibility without siteId is preserved.

reviewHistoryStrategy.uiUsage: Loaded for the selected Review Queue row and summarized in the selected submission panel.

workspaceChanges: Added a route-connected Review Queue section backed by /api/site/review-queue.
Added status, program, story, risk, search, and page-size filters.
Added queue summary tiles, queue rows, selected-submission panel, bounded history summary, and teacher feedback controls.
Program teachers see approve/request-revision/comment-only controls for submitted scoped rows.
Read-only roles see read-only copy and no active decision controls.
Mentor, student, and misc-admin navigation does not include the Review Queue section.
No mentor assignment, archive retry/export, user-management, announcement, or student messaging UI was added.

studentDetailIntegration.afterDecision: Successful decisions refresh the review queue and refresh an open student detail drawer for the selected student.
studentDetailIntegration.directoryState: Directory filters and pagination are not reset by review decision refreshes.

auditEvents.metadataPolicy: Safe site/submission/role summaries only; no full feedback body, raw Drive IDs, storage IDs, secrets, or credential values.

redactionProof: Queue route does not select raw Drive IDs, Drive parent folder IDs, storage keys, token/password fields, setup credentials, or raw audit metadata.
Workspace source tests reject raw storage/secret identifier strings.
Integration tests assert queue, history, and decision responses do not contain forbidden storage/secret fields.
Local proof checks site review queue output for forbidden Drive/storage/secret fields.
localProofUpdates: Local proof validates selected-site rows, viewer read-only, site-admin read-only, site-admin cross-site denial, program-teacher scoped queue, mentor/student denial, and no leak output.
Review mutation proof remains in integration tests to avoid making the local proof brittle by mutating seeded demo state.

results.productionSurfaces: passed with 91 production text surfaces scanned
results.test: passed with 295 passing tests and 4 expected local HTTP skips
results.localProof: passed with /api/site/review-queue scoped/read-only proof and mutation proof documented in integration tests
results.diffCheck: passed with CRLF normalization warnings only

blockers: Remote D1 still lacks migration 0011_multisite_site_role_foundation.sql, so no remote migration, remote write/seed, deploy, or hosted proof was run.
